content.en:
Airplanes!!!!

Haichen's master's blow slammed into Ye Tian's body.

Ye Tian wanted to dodge, but his speed was not enough, so he couldn't dodge in time.

However, after this blow stabbed Ye Tian, the damage was directly negated, and if the secret of life was added, Ye Tian was not injured, but retreated some distance.

"Are you alright?"

Haichen's controller was shocked.

"It's my turn!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Flameburst!"

Ye Tian used this Origin Control Technique with all his might.

Layers of time and space exploded, but Haichen's controller wandered away from the layers of time and space, and his whole body was protected by a golden light, no matter how powerful the power of the flame explosion was, it couldn't hurt Haichen's controller.

"Defensive Origin Mastery!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

With a defensive origin control skill, he can't hurt Haichen's controller.

However, Haichen's controller couldn't hurt him.

Thundered!!!!

The Great War continues.

Time passed slowly, and the battle between Ye Tian and Haichen's controllers gradually attracted the attention of other controllers.

After all, the battle between the two second-realm-level controllers and the third-realm-level controllers had too large a fluctuation range, and even the nearby Eternal Realm was affected, and some nearby giant cities were naturally also affected.

Soon, some of the Eternal Masters arrived to spy on the fighting.

"It's Haichen in control!"

"The other one seems to be a second-realm-level controller, and he can actually fight with the third-realm-level controller of Haichen to win or lose, how is this possible. The evaluation of the second realm level and the third realm level is the breath of strength, and the second realm level represents weak combat power!"

"If you look closely, the attack power, speed, and reaction of the Haichen controller are faster than this controller, and the attack of this second-realm master is only the attack strength of the normal second-realm master, but he can neutralize the attack of the Haichen controller, and it can even be said that he ignores the attack of the Haichen master. "

"Who is this second-realm master?"

Many Eternal Masters were very curious about Ye Tian's identity.

But the investigation of the Eternal Controller was very fast, and in a short time, Ye Tian's identity was dug up.

"He is the Infinite Master of the Thirteenth Boundary River, having been to the Seventh Boundary River before and swallowed up a devouring mountain. "

"What, Devouring Mountain, isn't this the ancestor of the Devouring Stream, and the Eternal Master has devoured it?"

"Although it is incredible, the information obtained is indeed the case, and now it seems that after devouring the Devouring Mountain, he has obtained the ability to Devour the Mountain Devouring Attack, so the Haichen Controller cannot hurt the Endless Controller. "

"This is terrifying, with the ability to devour the mountain devouring attack, it is equivalent to ignoring the attack, even the four realm-level masters can't kill him. "

"It is said that he is the senior brother of Yan Yan's master. "

"Yan Yan's controller is a registered disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, his identity is average, if this Infinite Controller is an official disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, then his identity is indeed very noble. "

"Most likely, it's an official disciple! Maybe this secret technique that can devour the Devouring Mountain comes from the Ten Elements Ancestor. "

......

"No, if this continues, I will run out of strength!"

Haichen's controller said secretly.

The power of the Origin Control Technique is indeed terrifying, but it also consumes a lot of power.

And after the battle so far, he can see that Ye Tian has barely lost any strength, and seems to have absorbed his attack as energy, his own strength is not consumed, and the opponent's life level is too high, and the combat power is endless. 、

can't hurt the other party, the other party hasn't consumed yet.

If he continues to fight, he may lose.

If a third-realm-level controller is defeated by a second-realm master, then he is definitely famous, and it is a way to become famous in a disgraceful way.

"I have to ask Uncle Guangming for help!"

Haichen decided to do so.

As for his father, he had already gone to a mysterious place and could not be contacted for the time being.

"Uncle Guangming, I'm in trouble, come quickly!"

The Haichen Controller communicated.

His Uncle Bright is the master of the Seven Realms, and his prestige is no less than that of the master of Turtle Mountain.

If the light controller comes, what is Ye Tian, he can be pinched to death with just one hand.

Of course, he, Uncle Guangming, would not necessarily kill Ye Tian, but he would definitely teach him a lesson.

After the interrogation, soon, time and space distorted, and a figure appeared.

"Uncle Guangming, this person is against me!"

Haichen's master flashed, came to the front of the light controller, and said.

Immediately, he glanced at Ye Tian, and his eyes seemed to say: Ye Tian, you are dead!

The Light Controller glanced at Ye Tian, and immediately slapped Haichen Controller's face in the face, directly fanning Haichen Controller's flight, and along the way, Haichen Controller also smashed layers of time and space.

The power of this blow is very strong, and if it were an ordinary controller, he would have been killed by a slap long ago.

"This is also something you can offend?"

The Light Controller questioned Haichen's Master.

At this time.

Haichen's controller was very confused, and he didn't know why the light controller wanted to beat him.

I saw that the Light Controller walked in front of Ye Tian, bent down and said respectfully, "The Light has seen Senior Brother Ye!"

"The Master of Light, it's you, long time no see. "

Ye Tian smiled.

He naturally thought that the Light Master, one of the official disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor.

At the beginning, when Ye Tian became a personal disciple, the other four personal disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor and many official disciples came to congratulate him.

And one of them was the Lightmaster, but after that, he hadn't seen the Lightmaster.

"Senior Brother Ye, my nephew is reckless, please forgive me. Said the Lightholder.

Ye Tian said: "I didn't offend your nephew, he saw that I exchanged a golden black blood fruit from Tuta, he wanted to buy it forcibly, I didn't buy it, no, he took action against me." You say, how to deal with this?"

The Light Controller knew that his nephew had indeed gone too far, and if it was an ordinary person, it would have offended the fifth ancestor of the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Not long after this fifth family descendant became the eternal master, that time was the time when he took a nap, and he had already become a second-realm level master, and his cultivation speed was terrifying.

In the future, this person who is bound to be expected to achieve the Nine Realms level controller is something he will not dare to offend!

"Senior Brother Ye, I will imprison Haichen's controller for 100 million realms. "

Said the Lightholder.

"Uncle Guangming, don't want it, 100 million world river years, it's too long!"

Haichen Controller cried.

"So be it. "

Ye Tian said lightly.

At this time, the Light Controller condensed a bare hand, crossed time and space, grabbed Haichen Controller, and immediately took the seal away.

All around, the onlookers of the Eternal Controller were stunned.
